title: 2025183 Dry547 Hhu5 L2Rgm
summary:
Main
• Capesize Spot Rates Stabilize as Traders Digest Recent Move - Capesize spot rates have stabilized at around the $20,000 mark after reaching their highest level for this time of year in many years. Significant congestion in West Africa has tightened the Atlantic market, contributing to the recent bullish sentiment among traders regarding the near-term rate outlook in that region. Meanwhile, Panamax spot rates have also experienced a strong rally, now comfortably exceeding $12,000-an impressive achievement given the headwinds posed by anemic grain and coal volumes in the last few months.
